Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kevil F. Woodall, Esq. of WOODALL LAW OFFICES, T:415.413.4629, for plaintiff/ moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF JOSE NEVAREZ'S Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint as follows:

Plaintiff Jose Nevarez's motion for leave to file second amended complaint is granted. The motion is supported by California's liberal policy of allowing amendments to pleadings. The pendency of similar litigation in other courts is not a ground for opposing the amendment. Defendant C & C Security Patrol, Inc. has not moved to stay or coordinate this action with the other pending actions.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, email:tonyvaughn@yahoo.com
